positive: Minimalist abstract watercolor botanical illustration of a stylized golden hour sunflower field, designed as an repeating pattern. Dominant colors are deep indigo blue, warm burnt orange, muted gold, and sage green. The composition features strong negative space and crisp, clean silhouettes of large, idealized sunflower heads and leafy vines. Use a vibrant, high-contrast color palette reminiscent of Alphonse Mucha's organic lines but with modern graphic clarity. Flat lay style, perfect for screen printing on t-shirts. Centered, symmetrical composition, natural soft glow lighting, highly detailed, vector art quality, 8k.
